ddls:
CREATE TABLE "texts" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text */,
  "text" TEXT /* The medical text itself */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the text */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the text was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the text */,
  "text_category" TEXT /* Category of the text */,
  "text_language" TEXT /* Language of the text */,
  "text_length" INTEGER /* Length of the text */,
  "text_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the text */,
  "text_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., medication, symptom, treatment) */,
  "entity_description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "entity_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the entity */,
  "entity_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the entity's appearance in the texts */,
  "entity_relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text from which the relationship was extracted */,
  "entity1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first entity in the relationship */,
  "entity2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second entity in the relationship */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., 'is prescribed for', 'is effective against') */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the relationship */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the relationship */,
  "relationship_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the relationship's appearance in the texts */,
  "relationship_relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the relationship */,
  "relationship_status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_entity2_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity2_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_relation_type FOREIGN KEY ("relation_type") REFERENCES relationship_types ("relation_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_entity1_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity1_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationship_types" (
  "relation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship type */,
  "relation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship type */,
  "relation_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship type */,
  "relation_type_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the relationship type */,
  "relation_type_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the relationship type's appearance in the texts */,
  "relation_type_relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the relationship type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, administrator) */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is associated with */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* The query text itself */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the query was made */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query */,
  "query_result_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the query */,
  "query_duration" REAL /* Duration of the query execution */,
  "query_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query that this result belongs to */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship that this result is based on */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "result_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the result */,
  "result_relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_results_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_aliases" (
  "alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alias */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity that this alias belongs to */,
  "alias_name" TEXT /* The alias name itself */,
  "alias_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the alias's appearance in the texts */,
  "alias_relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the alias */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_aliases_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity that this synonym belongs to */,
  "synonym_name" TEXT /* The synonym name itself */,
  "synonym_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the synonym's appearance in the texts */,
  "synonym_relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the synonym */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_synonyms_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the entity type */,
  "type_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the entity type */,
  "type_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the entity type's appearance in the texts */,
  "type_relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the entity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log entry */,
  "log_text" TEXT /* The log text itself */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was made */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry */,
  "log_duration" REAL /* Duration of the log entry, if applicable */,
  "log_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
